---
title: PAM Glider GitHub Repos
---

| Repo Link | Description |   |
|---------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| [glider-CalCurCEAS](https://github.com/sfregosi-noaa/glider-CalCurCEAS) | Glider piloting and general mission analysis for CalCurCEAS 2024 |
| [glider-WHICEAS](https://github.com/PIFSC-Protected-Species-Division/glider-WHICEAS) | 2026 WHICEAS glider survey |
| [GliderRodeo](https://github.com/NMFS-PAM-Glider/GliderRodeo) | Research Compendium for NOAA Fisheries PAM-Glider Rodeo 2026 |
| [PIFSC glider-lab](https://noaa-pifsc.github.io/glider-lab/) | PIFSC Glider Lab documentation and resources |
| [SWFSC glider-lab-manual](https://swfsc.github.io/glider-lab-manual/) | Quarto website for SWFSC ESD glider lab |
| glider-MHI |  |
